target: 55. Haine
Shinpei Ajiro
(…Before I knew it, I can see my surroundings even without a light.)
The walls are glowing faintly... It must be some kind of bioluminescent bacteria.
Maybe...
(Toki-chan was killed by the four-armed Shadow at the summer festival "last time".)
(In other words, it's likely that "Toki-chan is being used by them and will be betrayed in the end"... And she doesn't know that yet!)
This... I didn't get my hands dirty... for something like this...
(Those tears... If I can figure out the reason behind those tears, I might be able to convince Toki-chan, and maybe even save her!)
(Ushio is looking at me while still captured by the Shadows...)
(Don't move yet, Ushio... Now isn't the time. I have to find out the truth!)
(I can't loop just yet. Once I get information... I'll struggle with everything I have!)
(She nodded... I'm trusting that you understood my intentions, Ushio!)
I-It's not me!!
It's Hiruko-sama. Her stomach growling.
(It sounds like it's echoing from the depths of the earth... It's giving me goosebumps all over. It's not... of this world.)
I've made peace with <color=#GF_TIPS_031>what I'm doing</color>.
I won't ask for your forgiveness... Now that it's come to this, all I want is for everyone to accept it just like I have.

…But, Shinpei-san. Please don't tell Mio...
What you're about to see, what you're about to learn... Keep it from Mio...
I won't get Mio involved with this.
I'm glad... You really are kind...

(The space spreading out before me, long, long shadows stretch all the way to the ceiling. At the base of those shadows...)
It's exactly 9 o'clock... Time to eat.
(The girl in the red kimono... I finally found her... the girl from the summer festival!!)
(What did this girl do at that summer festival...? No, what I need to know is "what she plans to do"!!)
(If I know that, I can stop her! I have to grasp any clue I can from this situation...!!)
That form is the first person Hiruko-sama copied... "Haine." She prefers to be called by that name.
She is the god of Hitogashima, Hiruko-no-Mikoto. The mother of the Shadows.
...She's just... a little girl... About Shiori-chan's age... This kid... this kid is a god!!?
No doubt about it!! The bad presence I've been feeling all along... it's her! It's coming from her!!
(Hiruko-sama is the mother of Shadows...!! Was Hitogashima an island that worshipped Shadows!?)

Why is she getting a blood transfusion!? Is she sick or something?
…As you can see, <color=#GF_TIPS_019>Haine</color> is weak. The main cause is malnutrition due to a lack of food.
Hunger constantly subjects Haine to unbearable pain. Ushio-san, you should understand, right?
Recently, her legs have grown weak, making it hard to walk. So... she needed to acquire a replacement body.
How many times have we met like this?
Shinpei Ajiro.
Wh...! You're alive... you...
…It was you!!
(She killed Ushio, killed Mio— The monster that swallowed everyone... the whole island... That's... the god of this island...?)
(She's been here all along... from the very beginning...)

Ugh!!?

Shinpei, get back!!

—Tokiko.

(Her arms are melting black... she's a Shadow! She's carrying two coffins with the power of the Shadows...!)
…<color=#GF_TIPS_015>Negoro</color>...-san...

(Come to think of it, Nezu-san said that. They've decreased recently, but there were many Shadow sightings before the war.)

An average of four people a year... die on Hitogashima. From illness or accidents.
